description: A customer adds items to their online cart but leaves the website without checking out.

nodes.task_description: A system process identifies online carts that have been inactive for a set amount of time (e.g., 2 hours).

expected_outcome.value: The system flags the customer's cart as abandoned.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically sends an email to the customer.
The email shows the items left in their cart and provides a convenient link to return and complete their purchase.

expected_outcome.value: A targeted, automated email is sent to encourage the customer to complete the sale.
